message:
fix(pthread,glob,membrane): pthread_testcancel now exits thread, glob NOESCAPE fixes, fingerprint doc correction

- pthread_testcancel: actually call pthread_exit(PTHREAD_CANCELED) when
  a pending cancellation is consumed, instead of silently discarding it.
  Previously the function checked for cancellation but never acted on it.
- glob NOESCAPE: propagate the noescape flag into the recursive directory
  matching so backslash-star patterns are treated as magic wildcards when
  GLOB_NOESCAPE is set. Update the test to create a real filesystem entry
  with a backslash in the name and verify the pattern matches it.
- fingerprint.rs: correct doc comment to say 24-byte header (u64+u64+u64)
  instead of 20-byte (u64+u32+u64), matching the actual struct layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
